stemHtml: For Commercial Air Transport operations, which of the following would you expect to find in Part B of the Operations Manual?

options.a: De-icing and anti-icing hold-over time tables.
options.b: Performance data covering flights in icing conditions.
options.c: Training syllabi on hazardous atmospheric conditions, including icing.
options.d: Procedures for de-icing and anti-icing for a specific aerodrome.
